hero.headline: The yard crew *Huntsville trusts* for real results
hero.subheadline: Sod, drainage, plant beds — we handle what needs fixing and make it look right.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: What we fix and build
services_section.subheading: From dead lawns to drainage problems — one crew, multiple skills

services.title: Lawn Installation & Repair
services.description: Remove old grass, prep soil, install new sod. We handle irrigation heads and get everything growing right.

services.title: Drainage Solutions
services.description: Standing water ruining your yard? We install systems that actually work and keep water moving where it should.

services.title: Plant Beds & Landscaping
services.description: Design and install plant beds that look good now and grow better over time. No cookie-cutter layouts.

services.title: Irrigation Repair
services.description: Broken sprinkler heads, timing issues, coverage problems. We fix what's not working and upgrade what needs it.

about.heading: Built different in Huntsville
about.body: We're the landscaping crew that shows up when promised and finishes what we start. Real solutions for real yard problems.

reviews.name: D H.
reviews.text: Jesus made my plant beds look beautiful and installed a drainage system. Reasonable prices and excellent work!

reviews.name: Anna P.
reviews.text: Jesus and team completed several projects at my home. Very good quality at fair prices. Always responds promptly and shows up when promised.

reviews.name: William B.
reviews.text: Great job re-sodding my lawn! They prepped the dirt, ordered new sod, and reset all irrigation heads. Replaced any that malfunctioned too.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Where we work in North Alabama

cta.heading: Ready to fix your yard problems?
cta.body: Free quotes, honest pricing, and work that lasts. Let's talk about what your property needs.
